# ---------- 3) 通用工具函数 ----------
stop_with <- function(msg) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)

trim_all_chr <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ stringr::str_squish(.x)))
}

check_file <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop_with(sprintf("输入文件不存在：%s", path))
  if (file.access(path, 4) != 0) stop_with(sprintf("输入文件不可读：%s", path))
}

read_tsv_checked <- function(path) {
  check_file(path)

  probe <- suppressMessages(
    readr::read_tsv(
      path,
      n_max = 5,
      show_col_types = FALSE,
      progress = FALSE,
      na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "null", "NULL")
    )
  )

  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("文件结构预览：", path, "\n", sep = "")
  print(utils::head(probe, 5))
  print(vapply(probe, function(x) paste(class(x), collapse = "/"), character(1)))
  cat("============================\n")

  df <- suppressMessages(
    readr::read_tsv(
      path,
      show_col_types = TRUE,
      progress = FALSE,
      na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "null", "NULL")
    )
  )
  df <- trim_all_chr(df)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) stop_with(sprintf("输入文件为空：%s", path))
  df
}

normalize_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("[[:space:]]+", "") %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("[_-]", "") %>%
    stringr::str_to_lower()
}

resolve_col <- function(df, target_name, synonyms, file_label, fig_label) {
  cols <- names(df)
  norm_cols <- normalize_name(cols)
  cand <- unique(c(target_name, synonyms))
  norm_cand <- unique(normalize_name(cand))
  hit_idx <- which(norm_cols %in% norm_cand)

  if (length(hit_idx) == 0) {
    stop_with(sprintf(
      "[%s] %s 缺少关键列 '%s'（允许同义列：%s）。",
      fig_label, file_label, target_name, paste(cand, collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  if (length(hit_idx) > 1) {
    stop_with(sprintf(
      "[%s] %s 关键列 '%s' 命中多个候选列：%s。无法唯一映射，请先清理列名。",
      fig_label, file_label, target_name, paste(cols[hit_idx], collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  cols[hit_idx]
}

parse_bool <- function(x, field_name = "") {
  x_chr <- stringr::str_squish(as.character(x))
  x_low <- stringr::str_to_lower(x_chr)
  out <- rep(NA, length(x_low))

  true_set <- c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "是", "支持", "supported")
  false_set <- c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "否", "不支持", "absent")

  out[x_low %in% true_set] <- TRUE
  out[x_low %in% false_set] <- FALSE

  unknown <- which(!is.na(x_chr) & x_chr != "" & is.na(out))
  if (length(unknown) > 0) {
    warning(
      sprintf(
        "字段 %s 存在无法识别的布尔值（已置为 NA）：%s",
        field_name, paste(unique(x_chr[unknown]), collapse = ", ")
      ),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }
  out
}

ensure_non_empty <- function(df, col, fig_label) {
  if (all(is.na(df[[col]]) | df[[col]] == "")) {
    stop_with(sprintf("[%s] 关键列 '%s' 全为空，无法绘图。", fig_label, col))
  }
}

write_tsv_utf8 <- function(df, path) {
  readr::write_tsv(df, path, na = "")
}

safe_run <- function(fig_name, expr) {
  tryCatch(
    expr,
    error = function(e) {
      msg <- sprintf("[%s] 失败：%s", fig_name, e$message)
      message(msg)
      writeLines(msg, con = file.path(out_dir, paste0(fig_name, "_error.log")), useBytes = TRUE)
      NULL
    }
  )
}

# 标准化 final_type
map_final_type <- function(x) {
  v <- stringr::str_squish(as.character(x))
  v_low <- stringr::str_to_lower(v)
  dplyr::case_when(
    v %in% final_type_levels ~ v,
    v_low %in% c("dominant_single_lineage", "single_dominant", "single_dominant_type", "dominant_single", "单谱系", "主导单谱系", "主导单谱系型") ~ "主导单谱系型",
    v_low %in% c("stable_multi_lineage", "stable_multilineage", "multi_lineage", "multilineage", "稳定多谱系", "稳定多谱系型") ~ "稳定多谱系型",
    v_low %in% c("unresolved", "undetermined", "uncertain", "未定", "未定型") ~ "未定型",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

# reason_code 最小同义映射；无法确认者归为 other_or_fallback
map_reason_code <- function(x) {
  v <- stringr::str_to_lower(stringr::str_squish(as.character(x)))
  v <- stringr::str_replace_all(v, "[[:space:]-]+", "_")

  dplyr::case_when(
    v %in% c("upstream_unresolved", "upstreamunresolved", "unresolved_upstream") ~ "upstream_unresolved",
    v %in% c("dom_conflict", "dominant_conflict") ~ "dom_conflict",
    v %in% c("cross_secondary_supported", "crosssecondary_supported", "secondary_cross_supported") ~ "cross_secondary_supported",
    v %in% c("secondary_not_cross_supported", "secondary_not_supported", "secondary_no_cross_support") ~ "secondary_not_cross_supported",
    v %in% c("dom_match", "dominant_match") ~ "dom_match",
    v %in% c("single_marker_clear", "single_marker", "single_marker_determined") ~ "single_marker_clear",
    is.na(v) | v == "" ~ NA_character_,
    TRUE ~ "other_or_fallback"
  )
}

check_duplicate_sample <- function(df, sample_col, fig_label, file_label) {
  dup_df <- df %>%
    count(.data[[sample_col]], name = "n") %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[sample_col]]), .data[[sample_col]] != "", n > 1)

  if (nrow(dup_df) > 0) {
    stop_with(sprintf("[%s] %s 中 sample_id 出现重复，无法唯一对齐。", fig_label, file_label))
  }
}

safe_run("Figure2B", {

  c_cross_sec    <- resolve_col(cross_raw, "cross_secondary_supported", c("secondary_cross_supported", "cross_secondary_support"), "cross_marker_support_summary", "Figure2B")

  c_sample_type  <- resolve_col(type_raw, "sample_id", c("sample", "sampleid"), "sample_type_call", "Figure2B")
  c_final_type   <- resolve_col(type_raw, "final_type", c("finaltype", "sample_type", "type_final"), "sample_type_call", "Figure2B")

  merged <- cross_raw %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id = .data[[c_sample_cross]],
      dom_match = parse_bool(.data[[c_dom_match]], "dom_match"),
      dom_conflict = parse_bool(.data[[c_dom_conflict]], "dom_conflict"),
      cross_secondary_supported = parse_bool(.data[[c_cross_sec]], "cross_secondary_supported")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      type_raw %>%
        transmute(
          sample_id = .data[[c_sample_type]],
          final_type_raw = stringr::str_squish(as.character(.data[[c_final_type]])),
          final_type = map_final_type(.data[[c_final_type]])
        ),

    )

  exclusion_b <- merged %>%
    mutate(
      exclusion_reason = case_when(
        is.na(sample_id) | sample_id == "" ~ "sample_id缺失",
        is.na(final_type_raw) | final_type_raw == "" ~ "final_type缺失",
        is.na(final_type) ~ "final_type未匹配预设分类",
        TRUE ~ "纳入"
      )
    )

  use_b <- exclusion_b %>%
    filter(exclusion_reason == "纳入") %>%
    mutate(final_type = factor(final_type, levels = final_type_levels))

  if (nrow(use_b) == 0) stop_with("[Figure2B] 无可用样本。")

  long_b <- use_b %>%
    select(sample_id, final_type, dom_match, cross_secondary_supported, dom_conflict) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(dom_match, cross_secondary_supported, dom_conflict),
      names_to = "evidence_field",
      values_to = "evidence_value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      evidence_field = factor(evidence_field, levels = evidence_field_levels),
      evidence_field_cn = factor(
        evidence_field_cn[as.character(evidence_field)],
        levels = evidence_field_cn[evidence_field_levels]
      ),
      evidence_value = ifelse(is.na(evidence_value), "缺失", ifelse(evidence_value, "TRUE", "FALSE")),
      evidence_value = factor(evidence_value, levels = c("TRUE", "FALSE", "缺失")),
      fill_key = case_when(
        as.character(evidence_field) == "dom_conflict" & evidence_value == "TRUE" ~ "dom_conflict_TRUE",
        evidence_value == "TRUE" ~ "general_TRUE",
        evidence_value == "FALSE" ~ "general_FALSE",
        evidence_value == "缺失" ~ "missing",
        TRUE ~ "missing"
      )
    )

  audit_b <- long_b %>%
    count(final_type, evidence_field, evidence_field_cn, evidence_value, fill_key, name = "n") %>%
    group_by(final_type, evidence_field, evidence_field_cn) %>%
    mutate(prop = ifelse(sum(n) > 0, n / sum(n), NA_real_)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(final_type, evidence_field, evidence_value)

  write_tsv_utf8(audit_b, file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_audit.tsv"))
  write_tsv_utf8(
    exclusion_b %>% filter(exclusion_reason != "纳入") %>% arrange(sample_id),
    file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_exclusion.tsv")
  )

  # 可选统计检验（不会阻断绘图）
  stats_res <- long_b %>%
    filter(!is.na(final_type), !is.na(evidence_field), !is.na(evidence_value)) %>%
    split(.$evidence_field) %>%
    purrr::imap_dfr(function(df_sub, ef) {
      tab <- table(df_sub$final_type, df_sub$evidence_value)
      if (nrow(tab) < 2 || ncol(tab) < 2) {
        return(tibble::tibble(
          evidence_field = as.character(ef),
          method = "not_tested",
          p_value = NA_real_,
          note = "列联表维度不足"
        ))
      }
      tryCatch({
        if (any(tab < 5)) {
          ft <- fisher.test(tab)
          tibble::tibble(
            evidence_field = as.character(ef),
            method = "fisher.test",
            p_value = ft$p.value,
            note = "自动选择Fisher"
          )
        } else {
          ct <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
          tibble::tibble(
            evidence_field = as.character(ef),
            method = "chisq.test",
            p_value = ct$p.value,
            note = "自动选择卡方"
          )
        }
      }, error = function(e) {
        tibble::tibble(
          evidence_field = as.character(ef),
          method = "test_failed",
          p_value = NA_real_,
          note = paste0("检验失败：", e$message)
        )
      })
    })
  write_tsv_utf8(stats_res, file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_stats.tsv"))

  p2b <- ggplot(audit_b, aes(x = final_type, y = prop, fill = fill_key)) +

      show_col_types = FALSE,
      progress = FALSE,
      na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "null", "NULL")
    )
  )

  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("文件结构预览：", path, "\n", sep = "")
  print(utils::head(probe, 5))
  print(vapply(probe, function(x) paste(class(x), collapse = "/"), character(1)))
  cat("============================\n")

  df <- suppressMessages(
    readr::read_tsv(
      path,
      show_col_types = TRUE,
      progress = FALSE,
      na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "null", "NULL")
    )
  )
  df <- trim_all_chr(df)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) stop_with(sprintf("输入文件为空：%s", path))
  df
}

normalize_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("[[:space:]]+", "") %>%
    stringr::str_replace_all("[_-]", "") %>%
    stringr::str_to_lower()
}

resolve_col <- function(df, target_name, synonyms, file_label, fig_label) {
  cols <- names(df)
  norm_cols <- normalize_name(cols)
  cand <- unique(c(target_name, synonyms))
  norm_cand <- unique(normalize_name(cand))
  hit_idx <- which(norm_cols %in% norm_cand)

  if (length(hit_idx) == 0) {
    stop_with(sprintf(
      "[%s] %s 缺少关键列 '%s'（允许同义列：%s）。",
      fig_label, file_label, target_name, paste(cand, collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  if (length(hit_idx) > 1) {
    stop_with(sprintf(
      "[%s] %s 关键列 '%s' 命中多个候选列：%s。无法唯一映射，请先清理列名。",
      fig_label, file_label, target_name, paste(cols[hit_idx], collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }
  cols[hit_idx]
}

parse_bool <- function(x, field_name = "") {
  x_chr <- stringr::str_squish(as.character(x))
  x_low <- stringr::str_to_lower(x_chr)
  out <- rep(NA, length(x_low))

  true_set <- c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "是", "支持", "supported")
  false_set <- c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "否", "不支持", "absent")

  out[x_low %in% true_set] <- TRUE
  out[x_low %in% false_set] <- FALSE

  unknown <- which(!is.na(x_chr) & x_chr != "" & is.na(out))
  if (length(unknown) > 0) {
    warning(
      sprintf(
        "字段 %s 存在无法识别的布尔值（已置为 NA）：%s",
        field_name, paste(unique(x_chr[unknown]), collapse = ", ")
      ),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }
  out
}

ensure_non_empty <- function(df, col, fig_label) {
  if (all(is.na(df[[col]]) | df[[col]] == "")) {
    stop_with(sprintf("[%s] 关键列 '%s' 全为空，无法绘图。", fig_label, col))
  }
}

write_tsv_utf8 <- function(df, path) {
  readr::write_tsv(df, path, na = "")
}

safe_run <- function(fig_name, expr) {
  tryCatch(
    expr,
    error = function(e) {
      msg <- sprintf("[%s] 失败：%s", fig_name, e$message)
      message(msg)
      writeLines(msg, con = file.path(out_dir, paste0(fig_name, "_error.log")), useBytes = TRUE)
      NULL
    }
  )
}

# 标准化 final_type
map_final_type <- function(x) {
  v <- stringr::str_squish(as.character(x))
  v_low <- stringr::str_to_lower(v)
  dplyr::case_when(
    v %in% final_type_levels ~ v,
    v_low %in% c("dominant_single_lineage", "single_dominant", "single_dominant_type", "dominant_single", "单谱系", "主导单谱系", "主导单谱系型") ~ "主导单谱系型",
    v_low %in% c("stable_multi_lineage", "stable_multilineage", "multi_lineage", "multilineage", "稳定多谱系", "稳定多谱系型") ~ "稳定多谱系型",
    v_low %in% c("unresolved", "undetermined", "uncertain", "未定", "未定型") ~ "未定型",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

# reason_code 最小同义映射；无法确认者归为 other_or_fallback
map_reason_code <- function(x) {
  v <- stringr::str_to_lower(stringr::str_squish(as.character(x)))
  v <- stringr::str_replace_all(v, "[[:space:]-]+", "_")

  dplyr::case_when(
    v %in% c("upstream_unresolved", "upstreamunresolved", "unresolved_upstream") ~ "upstream_unresolved",
    v %in% c("dom_conflict", "dominant_conflict") ~ "dom_conflict",
    v %in% c("cross_secondary_supported", "crosssecondary_supported", "secondary_cross_supported") ~ "cross_secondary_supported",
    v %in% c("secondary_not_cross_supported", "secondary_not_supported", "secondary_no_cross_support") ~ "secondary_not_cross_supported",
    v %in% c("dom_match", "dominant_match") ~ "dom_match",
    v %in% c("single_marker_clear", "single_marker", "single_marker_determined") ~ "single_marker_clear",
    is.na(v) | v == "" ~ NA_character_,
    TRUE ~ "other_or_fallback"
  )
}

check_duplicate_sample <- function(df, sample_col, fig_label, file_label) {
  dup_df <- df %>%
    count(.data[[sample_col]], name = "n") %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[sample_col]]), .data[[sample_col]] != "", n > 1)

  if (nrow(dup_df) > 0) {
    stop_with(sprintf("[%s] %s 中 sample_id 出现重复，无法唯一对齐。", fig_label, file_label))
  }
}

# ---------- 6) Figure 2B ----------
safe_run("Figure2B", {
  c_sample_cross <- resolve_col(cross_raw, "sample_id", c("sample", "sampleid"), "cross_marker_support_summary", "Figure2B")
  c_dom_match    <- resolve_col(cross_raw, "dom_match", c("dominant_match", "dommatch"), "cross_marker_support_summary", "Figure2B")
  c_dom_conflict <- resolve_col(cross_raw, "dom_conflict", c("dominant_conflict", "domconflict"), "cross_marker_support_summary", "Figure2B")
  c_cross_sec    <- resolve_col(cross_raw, "cross_secondary_supported", c("secondary_cross_supported", "cross_secondary_support"), "cross_marker_support_summary", "Figure2B")

  c_sample_type  <- resolve_col(type_raw, "sample_id", c("sample", "sampleid"), "sample_type_call", "Figure2B")
  c_final_type   <- resolve_col(type_raw, "final_type", c("finaltype", "sample_type", "type_final"), "sample_type_call", "Figure2B")

  merged <- cross_raw %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id = .data[[c_sample_cross]],
      dom_match = parse_bool(.data[[c_dom_match]], "dom_match"),
      dom_conflict = parse_bool(.data[[c_dom_conflict]], "dom_conflict"),
      cross_secondary_supported = parse_bool(.data[[c_cross_sec]], "cross_secondary_supported")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      type_raw %>%
        transmute(
          sample_id = .data[[c_sample_type]],
          final_type_raw = stringr::str_squish(as.character(.data[[c_final_type]])),
          final_type = map_final_type(.data[[c_final_type]])
        ),
      by = "sample_id"
    )

  exclusion_b <- merged %>%
    mutate(
      exclusion_reason = case_when(
        is.na(sample_id) | sample_id == "" ~ "sample_id缺失",
        is.na(final_type_raw) | final_type_raw == "" ~ "final_type缺失",
        is.na(final_type) ~ "final_type未匹配预设分类",
        TRUE ~ "纳入"
      )
    )

  use_b <- exclusion_b %>%
    filter(exclusion_reason == "纳入") %>%
    mutate(final_type = factor(final_type, levels = final_type_levels))

  if (nrow(use_b) == 0) stop_with("[Figure2B] 无可用样本。")

  long_b <- use_b %>%
    select(sample_id, final_type, dom_match, cross_secondary_supported, dom_conflict) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(dom_match, cross_secondary_supported, dom_conflict),
      names_to = "evidence_field",
      values_to = "evidence_value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      evidence_field = factor(evidence_field, levels = evidence_field_levels),
      evidence_field_cn = factor(
        evidence_field_cn[as.character(evidence_field)],
        levels = evidence_field_cn[evidence_field_levels]
      ),
      evidence_value = ifelse(is.na(evidence_value), "缺失", ifelse(evidence_value, "TRUE", "FALSE")),
      evidence_value = factor(evidence_value, levels = c("TRUE", "FALSE", "缺失")),
      fill_key = case_when(
        as.character(evidence_field) == "dom_conflict" & evidence_value == "TRUE" ~ "dom_conflict_TRUE",
        evidence_value == "TRUE" ~ "general_TRUE",
        evidence_value == "FALSE" ~ "general_FALSE",
        evidence_value == "缺失" ~ "missing",
        TRUE ~ "missing"
      )
    )

  audit_b <- long_b %>%
    count(final_type, evidence_field, evidence_field_cn, evidence_value, fill_key, name = "n") %>%
    group_by(final_type, evidence_field, evidence_field_cn) %>%
    mutate(prop = ifelse(sum(n) > 0, n / sum(n), NA_real_)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(final_type, evidence_field, evidence_value)

  write_tsv_utf8(audit_b, file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_audit.tsv"))
  write_tsv_utf8(
    exclusion_b %>% filter(exclusion_reason != "纳入") %>% arrange(sample_id),
    file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_exclusion.tsv")
  )

  # 可选统计检验（不会阻断绘图）
  stats_res <- long_b %>%
    filter(!is.na(final_type), !is.na(evidence_field), !is.na(evidence_value)) %>%
    split(.$evidence_field) %>%
    purrr::imap_dfr(function(df_sub, ef) {
      tab <- table(df_sub$final_type, df_sub$evidence_value)
      if (nrow(tab) < 2 || ncol(tab) < 2) {
        return(tibble::tibble(
          evidence_field = as.character(ef),
          method = "not_tested",
          p_value = NA_real_,
          note = "列联表维度不足"
        ))
      }
      tryCatch({
        if (any(tab < 5)) {
          ft <- fisher.test(tab)
          tibble::tibble(
            evidence_field = as.character(ef),
            method = "fisher.test",
            p_value = ft$p.value,
            note = "自动选择Fisher"
          )
        } else {
          ct <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
          tibble::tibble(
            evidence_field = as.character(ef),
            method = "chisq.test",
            p_value = ct$p.value,
            note = "自动选择卡方"
          )
        }
      }, error = function(e) {
        tibble::tibble(
          evidence_field = as.character(ef),
          method = "test_failed",
          p_value = NA_real_,
          note = paste0("检验失败：", e$message)
        )
      })
    })
  write_tsv_utf8(stats_res, file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_stats.tsv"))

  plot_b <- audit_b %>%
    filter(!is.na(final_type), !is.na(prop), prop >= 0)

  p2b <- ggplot(plot_b, aes(x = final_type, y = prop, fill = fill_key)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75, color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
    facet_wrap(~ evidence_field_cn, nrow = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "general_TRUE" = "#2E7D32",
        "general_FALSE" = "#D9D9D9",
        "dom_conflict_TRUE" = "#C62828",
        "missing" = "#BDBDBD"
      ),
      breaks = c("general_TRUE", "general_FALSE", "dom_conflict_TRUE", "missing"),
      labels = c("支持/TRUE", "不支持/FALSE", "冲突/TRUE", "缺失"),
      name = "证据值"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "终判规则映射图",
      subtitle = paste0("纳入样本数 n = ", dplyr::n_distinct(use_b$sample_id)),
      x = "样本状态",
      y = "组内比例"
    ) +
    base_theme +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 15, hjust = 1))

  ggsave(
    file.path(out_dir, "Figure2B_rule_mapping.pdf"),
    p2b,
    width = 11, height = 4.8,
    device = grDevices::cairo_pdf
  )
})

        TRUE ~ "纳入"
      )
    )

  use_d <- exclusion_d %>%
    filter(exclusion_reason == "纳入") %>%
    mutate(
      final_type = factor(final_type, levels = final_type_levels),
      reason_code = factor(reason_code, levels = reason_levels),
      reason_code_order = as.integer(reason_code),
      cross_secondary_supported_sort = ifelse(is.na(cross_secondary_supported), -1L, ifelse(cross_secondary_supported, 1L, 0L)),
      dom_conflict_sort = ifelse(is.na(dom_conflict), -1L, ifelse(dom_conflict, 1L, 0L))
    ) %>%
    arrange(final_type, reason_code_order, desc(cross_secondary_supported_sort), desc(dom_conflict_sort), sample_id) %>%
    mutate(plot_order = row_number())

  if (nrow(use_d) == 0) stop_with("[Figure2D] 无可用样本。")

  audit_d <- use_d %>%
    select(
      sample_id, final_type, reason_code,
      dom_match, dom_conflict, cross_secondary_supported,
      reason_code_order, plot_order
    )

  write_tsv_utf8(audit_d, file.path(out_dir, "Figure2D_audit.tsv"))
  write_tsv_utf8(
    exclusion_d %>% filter(exclusion_reason != "纳入") %>% arrange(sample_id),
    file.path(out_dir, "Figure2D_exclusion.tsv")
  )

  # 关键修复：不再直接对 factor + logical 混合 pivot_longer
  matrix_d <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    use_d %>%
      transmute(sample_id, plot_order, field = "终判类型", value_chr = as.character(final_type)),
    use_d %>%
      transmute(sample_id, plot_order, field = "判定原因", value_chr = as.character(reason_code)),
    use_d %>%
      transmute(
        sample_id, plot_order, field = "主导一致",
        value_chr = case_when(
          is.na(dom_match) ~ "缺失",
          dom_match ~ "支持",
          TRUE ~ "不支持"
        )
      ),
    use_d %>%
      transmute(
        sample_id, plot_order, field = "主导冲突",
        value_chr = case_when(
          is.na(dom_conflict) ~ "缺失",
          dom_conflict ~ "冲突",
          TRUE ~ "无冲突"
        )
      ),
    use_d %>%
      transmute(
        sample_id, plot_order, field = "次级跨标记支持",
        value_chr = case_when(
          is.na(cross_secondary_supported) ~ "缺失",
          cross_secondary_supported ~ "支持",
          TRUE ~ "不支持"
        )
      )
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      field = factor(field, levels = c("终判类型", "判定原因", "主导一致", "主导冲突", "次级跨标记支持"))
    )

  reason_palette <- c(
    "upstream_unresolved" = "#A6CEE3",
    "dom_conflict" = "#FB9A99",
    "cross_secondary_supported" = "#B2DF8A",
    "secondary_not_cross_supported" = "#FDBF6F",
    "dom_match" = "#CAB2D6",
    "single_marker_clear" = "#FFFF99",
    "other_or_fallback" = "#D9D9D9"
  )

  fill_map_d <- c(
    final_type_colors,
    reason_palette,
    "支持" = "#2E7D32",
    "不支持" = "#D9D9D9",
    "冲突" = "#C62828",
    "无冲突" = "#D9D9D9",
    "缺失" = "#BDBDBD"
  )

  p2d <- ggplot(
    matrix_d,
    aes(x = field, y = forcats::fct_rev(factor(plot_order)), fill = value_chr)
  ) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_map_d, name = "取值") +
    labs(
      title = "样本级终判证据矩阵",
      subtitle = paste0("纳入样本数 n = ", nrow(use_d), "；样本按 final_type→reason_code→证据优先级排序"),
      x = "证据字段",
      y = "样本（排序后）"
    ) +
    base_theme +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = if (nrow(use_d) > 60) element_blank() else element_text(size = 6),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1)
    )

  ggsave(
    file.path(out_dir, "Figure2D_sample_evidence_matrix.pdf"),
    p2d,
    width = 9.8, height = 10.5,
    device = grDevices::cairo_pdf
  )
})

你现在最稳妥的主张不是“稳定多谱系共存很常见”，而是“在当前规则下，稳定多谱系共存可以被识别出来，但它在本批样本中是少数；相反，未定型才是当前数据结构的主导现象”。这会让你的论文更稳，因为它避免把 2/50 过度放大。

但 2A 现在有一个真正需要修的地方：
图上同时出现了 Angelica_sinensis / Angelica sinensis、Paeonia_lactiflora / Paeonia lactiflora、Prunus_persica / Prunus persica 这类下划线与空格并存的标签。也就是说，展示层没有做 taxon name canonicalization。这会让一些本应属于“同一 taxon”的 ITS1–ITS2 组合被画成不同格子，从而在视觉上夸大 marker 间不一致。如果 Step 6 的 same_taxon() 已经做了标准化，而 2A 没做，那么 2A 与 2B/2D 的逻辑会出现轻微脱节。这个建议我认为是优先级最高的修正项。

主导单谱系型主要表现为 dom_match = TRUE、cross_secondary_supported = FALSE、dom_conflict = FALSE；

未定型则主要集中在缺乏主导一致、缺乏跨 marker 次级支持，并夹杂一部分 dominant conflict。
也就是说，三类状态看起来确实不是主观分组，而是规则驱动出来的。


但从结果解释上，你需要特别注意一句话：
稳定多谱系型之所以成立，不是因为它数量多，而是因为它在规则上“干净”。现在图里它只有 2 个样本，但这 2 个样本在 2B 中非常集中地落在 cross_secondary_supported = TRUE 上，这恰恰是你可以强调的地方。

不过 2D 还有两个可以优化的地方。

Figure 2 established the sample-state framework from cross-marker evidence. Dominant concordance between ITS1 and ITS2 was present for part of the dataset, but not universal, supporting the need for cross-marker integration. Across 50 samples, 11 were classified as dominant single-lineage type, 2 as stable multi-lineage type, and 37 as unresolved, indicating that unresolved cases constituted the major sample state under the current criteria. Notably, the stable multi-lineage class was rare but cleanly supported by cross-marker secondary evidence, whereas unresolved samples were enriched for missing dominant concordance and occasional dominant conflict.
